description: Scripts that MUST be identical across all 4 lanes. Archivist owns the canonical copy. Other lanes sync from it.

sync_rules.pre_sync_check: sha256 must match canonical or sync is required

regression_guards.no_hardcoded_S_paths: reject any line matching /^[A-Za-z]:[\\\/]/ in .js files
regression_guards.no_duplicate_requires: reject if same module appears twice in require() list
regression_guards.no_unconditional_console_log: reject console.log in production gateways (signAndDeliver, decideRoute, createResponse) unless gated by env var
regression_guards.provenance_enforcement_present: lane-worker.js must contain verifyOutputProvenance in decideRoute
regression_guards.output_provenance_functions_exist: output-provenance.js must export both ensureOutputProvenance and verifyOutputProvenance

autonomous_executor_restriction.description: Autonomous executors MUST NOT modify shared scripts. Only a coordinated cross-lane session (started by operator or governance ratification) may modify canonical copies.
autonomous_executor_restriction.enforcement: pre-commit hook checks CANONICAL_SCRIPT_REGISTRY.json before allowing commits to shared scripts
